chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 403 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.1730/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2025 None present. Per office note, this is a time barred reference with delay of 233 days. The same has remained pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. Be that as it may, applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant department is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
